hero.title: Travel Itinerary Builder
hero.description: Organize destinations, activities, and practical trip details into one clear itinerary.

differences.title: Travel plans without scattered notes
differences.description: Keep the essential shape of a trip easy to understand and update.

items.title: Day-by-day structure
items.description: See activities and priorities in the order they happen.

items.title: Practical details
items.description: Keep useful notes alongside the plan.

items.title: Flexible review
items.description: Adjust the itinerary as plans become clearer.

feel.title: A calm view of the whole trip
feel.description: Build enough structure to travel confidently without over-planning.

items.title: Start with the trip frame
items.description: Add dates, destination, and the main purpose.

items.title: Plan each day
items.description: Group activities and useful notes in a clear order.

items.title: Review before departure
items.description: Check the itinerary and adjust priorities.

audiences.title: Who uses Itinerary Builder
audiences.description: Useful for solo trips, families, and group travel.

items.title: Solo travelers
items.description: Keep personal plans and notes organized.

items.title: Families
items.description: Create a clear shared outline for each day.

resourceSection.title: Useful trip details
resourceSection.description: Keep planning information close to the daily itinerary.

items.title: Activities

items.title: Travel notes

groupedSection.title: Plan around the trip
groupedSection.description: Organize each part of travel in a familiar way.

technicalSection.title: Built for flexible planning
technicalSection.description: Travel Itinerary Builder follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to plan the trip?
